node.statement: WP3 partial QED: The finite skeletal Fibonacci fusion table, golden-ratio algebra, F-matrix real algebra, PF scalar normalisations, binary coordinate isometry condition, coassociative scalar/F-vector check, and scalar no-mixing normalisation are validated in nodes 1.3.8, 1.3.1, 1.3.2, 1.3.3, 1.3.6, 1.3.4, and 1.3.7 (Lean files all PRESENT in current `Formalisation/Fibonacci/`, byte-verbatim per Phase-5; cross-checks PASS per `results/CHECKS.md`). Remaining WP3 work includes: **categorical coassociativity** `(η⊗id)η = (id⊗η)η` (not in [[def:coassoc]]; CLAUDE.md hallucination-risk callout #3); **categorical PF map isometry packaging** ([[def:PF]] at the categorical level rather than the binary coordinate level proven at 1.3.13); and basis/dependency enforcement (an infrastructure/organisation item, partially addressed by Phase-5 re-creation of dropped decls at P5.17).
